Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce a DuckDB SQL query that does the steps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Use window functions string_agg with order by timestamp to get sequence Then compute variant counts rank filter top K parameter Then join back to original events

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to ensure syntax for DuckDB string_agg expression delimiter WITHIN GROUP ORDER BY is supported Or we can use LIST AGG DuckDB supports LIST AGG and STRING AGG

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Use STRING AGG activity delimiter WITHIN GROUP ORDER BY timestamp as variant

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then we need to compute variant frequencies SELECT variant COUNT as case cnt FROM SELECT case id STRING AGG activity delimiter WITHIN GROUP ORDER BY timestamp AS variant FROM event log GROUP BY case id GROUP BY variant

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Then get top K use QUALIFY ROW NUMBER OVER ORDER BY case cnt DESC less than or equal to K or use a CTE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Finally filter original events join event log with case variants where case id in selected cases

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to return all events all columns for those cases

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Provide final query with placeholders for K for example a parameter Use WITH clauses
